name: python3-h2
title: python3-h2
summary: Pure-Python3 HTTP/2 State-Machine based protocol implementation in Python
description:
Pure-Python3 HTTP/2 State-Machine based protocol implementation in Python
This module contains a pure-Python HTTP/2 of a HTTP/2 protocol
stack. It’s written from the ground up to be embeddable in whatever
program you choose to use, ensuring that you can speak HTTP/2
regardless of your programming paradigm.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-h2 because Pure-Python3 HTTP/2 State-Machine based protocol implementation in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-h2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-h2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-h2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
